blocks.content: From the third round, Screamer's team abandoned the spear-to-spear tactic and employed a more advanced strategy.
Pony, the winger, moved to the central line and ran alongside Suavi.
They've shifted. As expected, they won't go down easily.
With three members in the central line, the left line was essentially abandoned.
As expected, Luman had completely retreated to the hill, covering all three lines.
When they entered the range of the Requiem of Death, Suavi's concentration wavered.
At that moment, Pony cast a spell.
Refresh.
A refreshing sensation washed over Suavi's mind, completely nullifying the effects of the Requiem of Death.
Although it provided no physical defense, it was an invaluable spell that blocked most crowd control effects.
Just having Refresh made it worth including a water-type magician in the party.

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: Hahaha! How about this? Can you still stop us?
Equipped with the combat package, Screamer transformed back into a warrior, sweeping through the battlefield.
Maya maintained her spell until the end.
Although she couldn't cut off Suavi, just tying down Pony's presence with Refresh was more than fulfilling her role as a guard.
As expected, Suavi is the key. She was last year too... That girl is really amazing.
The duration of the 20 combat package buffs varied, with the vision enhancement buff lasting 1.13 seconds and the muscle endurance enhancement buff lasting 1.78 seconds.
Initially, they were cast in order, but after about 20 cycles, the shorter-duration buffs would cycle 1-2 more times, interrupting the sequence.
Moreover, calculating the time consumed by the rotation made it clear that utility magicians required the highest concentration among magicians.
Tik-tok-tik-tak. Tok. Tak-tik-tik. Tak-tik-tik.
Therefore, utility magicians used a unique technique called the cross force, different from the usual force.
They set up a cross-shaped intersection, placed the core in the center, and collided the reserved cores from four directions towards the center.
The reason they could rotate the 20 buff cycles at precise times was due to the unique rhythm of 'tik-tok-tak-tik.'
When struck vertically, it was 'tik,' horizontally, it was 'tok,' and when bounced again in the same direction, it was 'tak,' feeling the 0.something second error through rhythm.
Tik-tik tak-tik-tok tik-ka-tik-tok tik-tik tak-tik-tok.
Bang. Bang-bang-bang. Bang-bang. Bang-bang-bang-bang.
Iruki closely observed the effects bursting in a unique rhythm above Screamer's head.
0.11 seconds. 0.23 seconds. 0.38 seconds. 0.49 seconds...

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: I'll cut it here.
But that was just a phenomenon occurring within Iruki's servant calculations.
Cancellation.
As Screamer's muscle enhancement buff was canceled, Suavi, maintaining the tik-tok-tak-tik, frowned.
When the vision enhancement and flexibility enhancement buffs also disappeared, the rhythm of the cross force began to tangle.
Even for a servant, this speed is unfair.
Cancellation was a difficult spell because it required perfectly reversing the vector quantity of the magic.
But that was a separate issue from reading the cores passing by at a speed of 4 times per second.
In short, Iruki's thinking speed was faster than Suavi's, even while analyzing the vector quantities of the cores and omnipotence without any error.

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: What the hell, Suavi!
Screamer shouted, looking back.
She had never made a mistake in the force before, so the current situation was unacceptable.

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: Where are you looking during a battle?
Screamer hurriedly turned his head.
Nade's hands pushed forward, and Lightning Shock exploded.

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: Ugh! You bastard!
Screamer's body was stunned.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: What? The sound of a pig being slaughtered?
Nade raised his fist in place of Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Why don't you cry like a pig being slaughtered!
Screamer's head twisted to the side as Nade's punch landed squarely on his jaw.
Meanwhile, in Screamer's team's territory, Luman was desperately holding off Shirone and Amy.
Using various crowd control techniques like Blind, Slow Trap, and Air Press, he was buying time, but the forward-linker combination was incredibly annoying.

blocks.speaker: Luman
blocks.content: Damn it! That cursed Hongan!
Amy's Hongan was the nemesis of crowd control.
No matter what crowd control spell was used, her self-image memory reset her mind, making it impossible to control her.

blocks.speaker: Luman
blocks.content: No choice. I'll cut Shirone.
Shirone's endurance was formidable, but he was more likely to be affected by crowd control than Hongan.
He's more popular than me despite being uglier.
Luman acted on personal feelings.
He believed he was the best.
Thinking he would be handsome if he lost weight, Shirone was a rival worth eliminating.

blocks.speaker: Luman
blocks.content: He must have kissed Amy too!

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: What are you talking about, you idiot!
Luman's Mountain Range exploded, creating a massive 10-meter-high wall that separated the two.
Amy is out. Now, Air Press!
As the powerful atmospheric pressure pressed down, Shirone's movements stopped.
Seizing the opportunity, Luman kicked off the ground and flew at him.
Amy, who had circled around the wall, widened her eyes.
Luman's belly protruded as he bent his back like a bow, exposing his navel. His molars were clenched tightly, and he was grimacing with all his might.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Shirone! Dodge!
It was clear that Luman was using his signature move, Spirit Hammer.
A non-attribute anti-magic crowd control spell that caused a stun by colliding Spirit Zones.
Often compared to a headbutt technique, Spirit Hammer was possible because the target also absorbed the impact energy.

blocks.speaker: Luman
blocks.content: I'll crush him, Shirone or not!
As proven in the survival test, Shirone's endurance was the strongest in the graduating class.
But the harder Spirit Hammer struck, the greater the impact on the target.
With the pride of a crowd control magician and the pride of being the most handsome in the graduating class, he aimed to destroy Shirone in one blow.

blocks.speaker: Luman
blocks.content: Here I come!
Seeing the menacing Luman, Shirone instinctively prepared a defensive mental state.
As his Spirit Zone switched to defense mode, Luman swung his forehead, bouncing his belly.
Clang!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ugh!
Shirone grimaced and stepped back.
Although he wasn't actually hit on the head, it felt like someone had struck his skull with a hammer.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Shirone! Are you okay?
Amy hurried over.
Even from a distance, it was clear that the Spirit Hammer had hit properly.
But why isn't there a follow-up attack?
When Amy turned her head, Luman was standing, panting.
Suddenly, his nose bled, and his heavy body wobbled before he fell on his butt.
Luman's eyes were completely unfocused as he sat on the ground, supporting himself with his arms.
Although anti-magic spells were inherently a seesaw game, Spirit Hammer was a spell where the attacker always had the advantage.
Yet, the shock from casting Spirit Hammer had blown his mind.
Was this what it felt like to hit one's head on a diamond?

blocks.speaker: Luman
blocks.content: Damn it! What am I supposed to do if he's this tough?
Having been stunned by his own attack, he couldn't even muster the strength to stand.
It seemed his mental strength would only recover by the end of the third round.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Now! Let's go!
Shirone ran past Luman and up the hill.
Amy, checking their own territory, saw Nade land a punch that twisted Screamer's jaw and followed behind.
Aider struggled, firing his air gun, but had to retreat outside the range of Shirone's Radiance.
In the meantime, Amy pulled out the flag.
The third round ends. The fourth round will start in 5 minutes.
Everyone's movements stopped, and the tension eased.
But Screamer's eyes still glinted with murderous intent.
Although he had mellowed considerably since entering the magic school, the humiliation of being punched by a magician was unbearable.

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: Are you crazy? How dare you hit me?
Nade scoffed and replied.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Why? Do you think you're something special? If you did something to deserve a punch, you get punched. Why get mad about that?
Screamer suddenly closed the distance and got in Nade's face.

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: Yeah? Then how about we settle this outside? If you're a magician, just use magic. Don't think about throwing punches in front of me.
Nade closed his mouth.
A fight with clear winners and losers didn't excite him.
If it were a fight where one had to die, could he provoke so easily then?

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: Hmph! Coward!
As Screamer walked away, Nade turned to his friends with a bright expression as if nothing had happened.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Alright! We're turning this around! Let's keep it up!
Shirone asked.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What happened? What did Screamer say?

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Huh? I don't know, I forgot. Anyway, Maya! How did I do?
Maya realized why Nade had punched Screamer.
As the one who had dragged her into the fight, he had hit him on her behalf.

blocks.speaker: Maya
blocks.content: Yeah! It felt great! Thanks, Nade.
She must have felt guilty about keeping her distance recently.
Although it was because of Shirone that she had been cold, she felt sorry and grateful that they had thought that way.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: It's a good thing we have Maya. Even as a guard, she's debuffing the enemies, making them confused.

blocks.speaker: Maya
blocks.content: Hehe! I'll do my best in the next round too!
Maya's face blushed, and Nade and Iruki exchanged glances.
She was completely different from a few days ago.

blocks.speaker: Maya
blocks.content: Shirone praised me...
Maya no longer wanted to hide her feelings.
There had been opportunities to stop, but she willingly jumped into the fray.
So, shouldn't she at least enjoy these small moments of happiness?
Meanwhile, Screamer frowned as he looked at Luman, who was sitting like a defeated soldier.
He had used Spirit Hammer on Shirone and ended up like this.
No matter how confident he was, it was a ridiculous decision.

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: Why did you do that? You know Shirone's endurance.

blocks.speaker: Luman
blocks.content: Then should I have used it on Hongan? That's like pouring water into a bottomless pit. At least Shirone can be broken. Ugh, but that guy really has a hard head. My head is killing me.
Screamer sighed.

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: Anyway, how are you? Can you recover?
Pony spoke up.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: I've cast Refresh. But I think I need to take it easy until the next round.
Luman looked at Pony and said.

blocks.speaker: Luman
blocks.content: Don't just stand there, massage my head. It still hurts.
A vein popped on Pony's temple.
How dare he ask a royal to give him a massage?
Especially since Luman was the man she disliked the most in the graduating class, aside from Fermi's group.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: I can't ruin the teamwork. I don't want to hear that we lost because of me.
With the patience of someone holding back the urge to kill three times, Pony massaged Luman's head from behind.
Every time her slender fingers pressed into his head, a thick groan escaped Luman's mouth.

blocks.speaker: Luman
blocks.content: Ah, that feels good. By the way, Screamer, you'll introduce me to a pretty girl after this match, right?
Pony's fingers pressed harder.
She couldn't understand Luman's mindset of using a life-changing evaluation for personal gain.
But that was the world of magic.
Luman knew his personality.
If you had skills, no matter how eccentric you were, you were recognized as a magician.

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: To be precise, if we win. So recover as quickly as possible. It would be embarrassing if we lost.

blocks.speaker: Luman
blocks.content: Hmph! I'll just recharge this round. Then we'll go straight to 5 points and finish it.
At the moment, Luman's strategy was the most realistic.
Besides, Shirone's team would likely take it easy this round because of Maya.
The guard position had no other tasks besides defense, but Maya had been continuously casting spells for three rounds to hinder Suavi.
With her basic skills lacking, she must be exhausted.
Screamer made his decision.

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: Alright, let's buy some time. But that doesn't mean we're giving up the round. If an opportunity arises, we'll strike immediately.
